summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enterprise Initiative Control Tower after SelectItem fix. All major objectives achieved - frontend now at 100% success rate with no React errors.

Code Red flags showing with alert triangles
Professional Vertiv branding with orange theme (#FE5B1B)
All page navigation successful (4/4 pages: Dashboard, Code Red, Financial, Risk Heatmap, All Initiatives)
Table sorting and display formatting correct
